_comment: DELEGATE-FIRST: wrap your project's existing verify command as ONE gate so the harness runs your real CI, not a parallel copy. The harness is stack-agnostic — 'cmd' is any shell command. Per stack: Python -> 'pytest -q' or 'make verify' | Java -> 'mvn -q test' or 'gradle test' | C#/.NET -> 'dotnet test' | Node/TS -> 'npm run check'. Use the multi-gate '_greenfield_example' below only when the project has NO runner yet.
